title: FunkyFrames
description: Paintings feel too static? Try some Funky Frames
body:
This mod adds new paintings to the game that have a bit of a twist, each painting is augmented using shaders (not the laggy kind) to add some moving parts and flair to them!

Right now there are 3 paintings, but more will be added in the future, if you have any painting ideas, be sure to tell me about them on the discord!

Nether Portal Trans Flag Troubles Brewing
